steps.title: Identify the variables
steps.content: In the function $f(x)=4{,}500(1.02)^x$, the input $x$ is the number of years after the investment was made. The output $f(x)$ is the value of the CD in dollars.

steps.title: Interpret the function value
steps.content: The statement says $f(2)$ is approximately $4{,}681.80$. Since $x$ is measured in years, this describes the CD value $2$ years after the investment.

steps.title: Choose the context statement
steps.content: The statement says that $2$ years after the investment was made, the value of the CD was approximately $4{,}681.80$ dollars. The answer is C.
